response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with only a brief, non-detailed mention of C++ in a 2014 role at National Instruments; their career is overwhelmingly focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile stacks, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Proven ability to lead open-source and complex distributed systems
Excellent communication and mentoring background via workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL work in the last 10 years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) and embedded systems
No demonstrated experience with MQTT, REST in IoT context, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA)
